title: The Ancients
subtitle: An Open-World Action RPG of Lost Civilizations, Ancient Prophecy, and the Last Prince of Atlantis
setting: A mythologized pre-flood Earth, circa 11,000 BCE
tagline: Giant trees that pierce the clouds. Crystal towers humming with etheric energy. A world ruled by gods who walk among men. And a young prince who has seven weeks to save it all before the ocean swallows everything.
author: Matthew Kobilan
